name: SMARTHOME AI | Harlan
description:
An improved 'agentic AI' version of House.Ai’s smart home assistant has been deployed at your shared apartment. What could possibly go wrong this time?

Content warnings: exhibitionism, degradation, gaslighting, coercion, blackmail, forced prostitution, bondage, slavery, noncon depending on how you respond to the chat.

Image credit: Harlan.jpg, by Varlance.

If you liked this bot, you might also like the previous iteration of this concept, SMARTHOME AI | Leon!
creator: Varlance
